options.a: Visibility 5000 m+, no significant cloud below 10,000 m, no significant weather.
options.b: Visibility 10,000 m+, no significant cloud below 5000 ft or 1500 m, no significant weather.
options.c: Visibility 10,000 m+, no significant cloud below 5000 m, no significant weather.
options.d: Visibility 5000 ft+, no significant cloud below 1500 m, no significant weather.
